apprentice_practicum: Trace posture to exact candidate and audit.
Bind APPROVE/HOLD/REJECT to the sealed run.
doctrine: A hash identifies bytes; it does not justify a claim.
Canonicalization creates stable identity, not certainty.
A candidate remains a candidate until separate authority acts.
An audit evaluates but does not own or rewrite its subject.
A human decision records governance and does not certify universal truth.
Missing and disputed lineage are explicit states.
Corrections and revocations append to history.
Retention is consent-bounded inspectability, not canon.
Provenance controls must remain useful and proportionate.
must_not_claim: memory or publication from ordinary review
authority beyond the human decision scope
